understanding.goal_understanding: Get ANY pushable object — the selected piece or any pushable block — to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in level.target_x.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected controllable piece exactly one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction (left, right, up, down). If a pushable object (block) is adjacent in the movement direction, it is pushed along by one STEP; walls block movement, with some boundaries potentially behaving differently for direct movement versus pushing objects against them. SELECT switches control to another controllable object by its id.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Push the adjacent block 'pb' right to [6,0] by moving right; this will reach target_x=6 and win if the push succeeds against the wall.
history.reasoning: Push the adjacent block 'pb' right to [6,0] by moving right; this will reach target_x=6 and win if the push succeeds against the wall.
